text: I find myself wandering in a dimly lit, seemingly deserted space. The emptiness amplifies my awareness of existence—every shadow, every silent object becomes meaningful in its solitude. The tilted perspective of my view adds to the strangeness, making me feel both curious and unsettled, as if I am trespassing into the unknown. It feels as if I am searching for clarity—perhaps philosophically, perhaps literally—in the darkness that envelopes me.
